adversarial.description: Beyond re-running all 12 contract verifications to EXIT:0: (E01) anti-vacuity confirms HEAD~1 (the F-053 merge 5d49fb5) had neither new primitive, no enum_index fixture, and no self-test wiring; (E05) the enumeration guard is load-bearing -- a scratch index dropping methodology docs FAILS against the real methodology/ dir; (E06) the bare-ref guard is load-bearing -- a seeded bare '05_release_train.md' (the EXACT NDEBT-003b defect) is caught while every real methodology/ + standard/ doc passes; (E07) the false-positive risk NDEBT-005 was deferred over is proven REAL and handled -- ecosystem/README.md WOULD flag five forward-refs (rc=1), which is precisely why the real-tree sweep excludes ecosystem/ and is scoped to the stable methodology/ + standard/ modules. The naive whole-tree scan's 19 'unresolved' tokens were independently confirmed 100% false positives (forward-refs to planned ecosystem stages + DEBT.md quoting the historical defect).
adversarial.process_note: Single-session collapsed-role execution, disclosed-and-permitted by the AGF Orchestrator clause. Design validated by a real-tree implementation spike before the contract was finalized. E04/E05/E06 dogfood the Section 11 probe-isolation rule (fail-closed $SB, scratch-inside-repo refusal, rm -rf --), and E03/E04/E05/E06/E09/E10 the NDEBT-019 rc-capture rule -- the exact rules F-053 codified. All mutation stays in a session-scratch root; the real tree is never mutated.

evidence_bundle_check.diff_patch_reasoning: .agent/evidence/055/diff.patch is `git diff HEAD~1..HEAD` at deliverable commit f2c109a; E11 independently re-asserts HEAD~1..HEAD touches exactly the seven contracted files and no .agent path.
evidence_bundle_check.flat_files: 12 per-entry captures 055-verify-01..12.txt + the consolidated 055/verification.txt (12 EXIT:0 markers) + 055/diff.patch.

acceptance_reconciliation.summary: The single acceptance test -- 'a seeded enumeration omission and a seeded bare stale reference each fail their guard in the self-test surface; the guards source from a canonical index, not duplicated lists' -- maps to: seeded enumeration omission -> E04 (scratch omission returns 1) + E09 (the enumeration OK line in the 46/46 self-test); seeded bare stale reference -> E03 (fail fixture rc=1) + E09 (the bare-ref fail OK line); canonical-index sourcing -> E08 (both primitives resolve from a JSON index's key_documents, passed as an argument, not a duplicated inline list). The real-tree recurrence sweep (E05/E06) and the false-positive scoping proof (E07) exceed the acceptance test, making the guards genuine recurrence guards rather than fixture-only discriminators.

non_blocking_observations: SCOPE OVER ESTIMATE (disclosed): 282 actual ins+del vs 160 estimated (+76%) -> scope_over_estimate flag. NOT the 3x-rolling flag: last-3 average (051=155, 052=678, 053=221) = 351, 3x = 1054, and 282 is well under; cumulative 1694/2236 = 75.8%, under the 130% halt. The weight is tools/verify_lib.sh (171 ins+del) -- the two primitives' doc headers match the library's existing heavily-documented style -- plus the self-test wiring (61). Documentation-and-mechanization density, not code sprawl; surfaced for operator acknowledgment (flag, not halt).

NEXT-FEATURE CHOICE was abort-driven (disclosed): the AskUserQuestion selecting the next ungated root aborted (permission stream closed, as before 050/053); proceeded with the recommended 055 under the phase activation's standing authorization + the operator's 'Continue', PR as the redirect mechanism. Reversible on the branch before merge.

GUARDS LIVE ON THE SELF-TEST SURFACE, NOT A NEW C-CHECK (by design): the feature spec places them on the F-052 self-test (a CI job), so validate.sh's 13-check sweep is unchanged. The real-tree sweep in fixtures_self_test.sh IS the recurrence guard that runs in CI on every PR.

final_verdict.summary: Feature 055 APPROVED. All 12 contract verifications re-run to EXIT:0. Two vetted verify_lib.sh primitives mechanize the NDEBT-003 defect classes as the NDEBT-005 recurrence guard, sourced from the canonical index NIZAM.json: vlib_enumeration_complete (disk->index completeness C4 omits, green over all four doc modules) and vlib_bare_ref_resolves (bare non-/-qualified NN_name.md, the C9/C10 blind spot). Both are wired into the F-052 self-test surface with seeded-negative fixtures AND a real-tree recurrence sweep; the bare-ref sweep is deliberately scoped to methodology/ + standard/ to avoid the false-positive risk NDEBT-005 was deferred over (E07 proves the risk real and the scoping principled). Self-test 46/46, validate 13/13, payload 11/11, e2e green. DEBT 0.24.0 (NDEBT-005 -> Resolved). Three disclosed non-blocking items ride to the operator: the scope-over-estimate flag, the abort-driven feature choice, and the self-test-surface (not new C-check) placement.
